title: Mechanical Journeys
description: Create sophisticated machines in an exciting, immersive Vanilla+ world full of adventurous challenges!
body:
![Mechanical Journeys Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ri0iVDHA/images/c01e05aeb35befb4fcf2a2780d56b8e497039b21.png) # About Mechanical Journeys focuses on preserving a good balance between Minecraft modded and Vanilla by improving [terrain and structure generations](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mechanical-journeys#generation) in the Overworld, Nether and End, but also by adding [Create and some of its addons](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mechanical-journeys#create), all true to Vanilla. It offers a refreshing, immersive experience, filling the gaps in Vanilla content by improving multiple areas such as adventure, decoration, equipment, food, mobs, graphics and optimizations. In addition, [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) are bundled. There are no quests in this pack, and only you will find the meaning of your mechanical journeys. Too much talk but not enough pictures? [Take a look at the gallery!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mechanical-journeys/gallery) # Mods overview (non-exhaustive)

Generation

- [Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/wXiGiyGX) - [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/fgmhI8kH) - [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/mod/tpehi7ww) - [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/LPjGiSO4) - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/8oi3bsk5) - [YUNG's Better Desert Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/XNlO7sBv) - [YUNG's Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/o1C1Dkj5) - [YUNG's Better End Island](https://modrinth.com/mod/2BwBOmBQ) - [YUNG's Better Jungle Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/z9Ve58Ih) - [YUNG's Better Mineshafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/HjmxVlSr) - [YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses](https://modrinth.com/mod/Z2mXHnxP) - [YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dT9sgt4) - [YUNG's Better Witch Huts](https://modrinth.com/mod/t5FRdP87) - [YUNG's Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZYgyPyfq)
